options.content: **Pressure Stall Information** measures the % of time tasks are stalled waiting for resources. **CPU waiting** = runnable tasks queued with no CPU available. **IO waiting/stalled** = tasks blocked on disk I/O (waiting = some tasks; stalled = all tasks). **Memory waiting/stalled** = tasks blocked on memory reclaim/swap. **IRQ stalled** = tasks delayed by interrupt processing. High values reveal the system's bottleneck: CPU-bound, IO-bound, or memory-bound.
